_note: Curated from pylint-odoo v9.x for Odoo v17. Rules merged with live-extracted pylint-odoo/ESLint/ruff rules (per parser_lint_rules.py). v17: `name_get()` removed (use `_compute_display_name`), `group_operator` still valid (renamed v18), `UserError` lazy args, `active_test` context, new asset bundling stable, `attrs`/`states` XML attrs removed (use domain-based visibility).

rules.message: Manifest file is missing required key `name`.
Manifest file is missing required key `version`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `author`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `license`.
Manifest file `installable` key should be a boolean.
`@api.multi` is removed in v17 â€” use plain method with `for rec in self:` loop.
`@api.one` is removed in v17.
New model class is missing `_name` attribute.
`_inherit` without `_name` creates extension â€” ensure this is intentional.
ir.model.access entry missing from security CSV â€” model may be inaccessible.
XML id reference does not match any declared id in the module or its dependencies.
Translation string uses positional `%s` formatting â€” use named `%(name)s`.
Translatable string concatenation â€” do not split translatable strings across `+` operators.
File declared in manifest `data` list does not exist.
SQL injection risk: `cr.execute` called with string interpolation.
Built-in dynamic expression interpreter used with external input â€” use `odoo.tools.safe_eval` instead.
`sudo()` called without restricting scope â€” avoid broad `sudo()` for entire CRUD operations.
Hardcoded database ID used â€” use `env.ref()` instead.
Hardcoded company or currency ID â€” use `self.env.company` or `self.env.user.company_id`.
`_rec_name` field not present in model fields.
`copy()` override does not call `super()`.
`write()` override does not call `super()` â€” record changes may not be persisted.
`create()` override does not call `super()`.
`unlink()` override does not call `super()`.
`invalidate_cache()` removed â€” use `flush_recordset()` or `invalidate_recordset()`.
`web.Widget` class used â€” deprecated in v16+; migrate to OWL component.
`track_visibility` field attribute renamed to `tracking` in v16+.
`attrs` attribute in XML view removed in v17 â€” use Python-domain `invisible`/`required`/`readonly` directly.
`states` attribute in XML view removed in v17 â€” use `invisible` domain expression instead.
N+1 ORM query in loop: `browse()` or `search()` called inside a `for` loop over records.
Computed field missing `@api.depends` decorator â€” will never be recomputed automatically.
`search()` method override must return a recordset and call `super()`.
Many2one field missing `ondelete` parameter â€” defaults to 'set null' which may leave orphan references.
`digits=(16, 2)` tuple format deprecated â€” use a precision field name string.
`copy=True` set on a field with a unique SQL constraint â€” duplication will fail.
`default_get()` override does not call `super()` â€” default values from other modules will be lost.
`_sql_constraints` entry message is not wrapped in `_()` for translation.
`fields.Html` field without `sanitize=True` may allow XSS â€” verify sanitization is intentional.
`_order` attribute references a field that does not exist in the model.
Static assets declared via `qweb` key â€” use `assets` key with bundle names in v17.
XPath `position='replace'` removes the target element entirely â€” verify this is intentional.
View inheritance without `inherit_id` â€” `<record model='ir.ui.view'>` missing `inherit_id` field.
OWL component class not registered via `registry` â€” component will not be accessible.
OWL component uses deprecated lifecycle hook `mounted` â€” use `onMounted` hook.
String formatting used in UserError/ValidationError â€” use lazy args or named placeholders instead of %-interpolation.
rules.fix_template:
raise UserError(_('Hello %(name)s') % {'name': name})  # acceptable
raise UserError(_('Hello %s', name))  # preferred (Odoo 16+ lazy format)

rules.message: `name_get()` override is removed in v17 â€” use `_compute_display_name()` instead.
`active` field defined without `active_test` context consideration â€” filtered domains may behave unexpectedly.
`_sql_constraints` entry uses invalid constraint type.
Unexpected `var`. Use `let` or `const` instead.
Unexpected `console` statement in production JS.
Reference to undeclared variable.
Variable declared but never used.
OWL template references a component not imported.
Blind exception: do not catch `Exception` without re-raising or logging â€” catches too broadly.
Line too long (exceeds max line length).
Import block is unsorted or has wrong grouping.
Module imported but unused.

Bare free-identifier arrow in t-on (e.g. t-on-click="() => onFoo()" where onFoo is not a component method, a prop, or a slot variable) resolves to nothing at render. Use t-on-click="onFoo" (auto-bound) or t-on-click="() => this.onFoo()" â€” both of those are valid.
A useService() result that drives the template should preserve reactivity: wrap it as useState(useService("...")) when the service is not already reactive. Confirm per service and target version.
Raw contenteditable bypasses the audited editor and its sanitisation. Delegate to the web_editor Wysiwyg, lazy-loaded in onWillStart with stable props.
t-set-slot="body" is invalid under <Dialog>: the body IS the default slot. Put body content in the default slot; only header and footer are named slots.
Possible SQL injection risk - string interpolation used in SQL query. Use parameterized queries instead.
